mnemonics: Thread 0: Think of 'Zero' as the starting point, like the first step in a journey.
Iterations 0-1: Imagine counting from 0 to 1, just one step forward.
keyPoints: Thread 0 represents the first thread working on the computation.
The first iteration (iteration 0) is the initial setup before any computation begins.
The second iteration (iteration 1) is where the actual computation starts.
